announcement.text: CLICK HERE AND DISCOVER HEXAI — REVOLUTIONIZE YOUR IMAGING CENTER

hero.headline: Your business deserves the right solutions.
hero.subtitle: Offer your patients the best in prevention, diagnosis, therapy and follow-up, elevating your standard of care while reducing operational risks and maintenance costs thanks to the robustness and high durability of our equipment.
hero.sideText: We deliver more than products — customized solutions to meet the needs of demanding services with effective solutions for every reality and expectation, including clinics, universities and hospitals.

cards.productsDesc: Italian technology for the most diverse areas of healthcare. Enjoy energy efficiency, high quality and reliability from Esaote.
cards.servicesDesc: Whether it's a technical visit, maintenance or a full consultancy. We're here to serve you with excellence.

techSection.title: Technology and expertise combined in one place
techSection.subtitle: A center equipped to meet all demands in maintenance, testing and repair of medical equipment, with an internationally certified team and national coverage.
techSection.maintenanceDesc: We operate with our services throughout the national territory performing preventive and corrective maintenance that can be carried out individually or under service contracts with and without parts.
techSection.labDesc: We have our own laboratory specialized in repairing coils, power supplies, boards and peripherals. Rigorous process of analysis, recovery and testing.

testimonials.title: Clients who recommend. Results that prove.
testimonials.subtitle: Hexamedical goes beyond delivery: offering continuous support, agility and a real commitment to our partners' success.

ceo.label: CEO's Word
ceo.name: Fabio Zatti
ceo.description: Learn about the vision of Hexamedical's founder on innovation, commitment to quality and the future of diagnostic imaging technology in Brazil.
ceo.stat: Years leading Hexamedical, driving innovation in medical equipment

team.label: Team Hexa
team.title: Committed to our clients' success
team.description: Our team's premise is the pursuit of continuous improvement, understanding the client's needs and offering everything from efficient service to fast and accurate technical support.

stats.experience: Years of experience in medical equipment

hexai.title: HexAI: Artificial Intelligence for Diagnostic Imaging
hexai.description: Enhance your team's diagnostic accuracy and productivity with artificial intelligence applied to MRI exam analysis.
hexai.feat1Desc: AI that assists in exam interpretation with precision and agility.
hexai.feat2Desc: Reduce report time and increase patient throughput.
hexai.feat3Desc: Compatible with the main PACS and RIS systems on the market.

blog.title: Featured Content
blog.subtitle: Insights, technical guides and news from the diagnostic imaging market.

differentials.title: Why choose Hexamedical?
differentials.subtitle: We are a reference in MRI solutions with differentials that ensure security, performance and predictability for your operation.
differentials.nationalCoverageDesc: Units in SP, RJ, BH, Goiânia and Florianópolis. In-person and remote service throughout Brazil.
differentials.ownLabDesc: Coil, electronic board, power supply and peripheral repair with 3 dedicated testing rooms.
differentials.certifiedTeamDesc: Field and laboratory technicians with extensive experience in multi-manufacturer equipment.
differentials.originalPartsDesc: We work with original and certified parts, with express logistics for fast delivery.
differentials.flexibleContractsDesc: Customized plans with or without parts, preventive and corrective, adapted to your reality.
differentials.experienceDesc: Over 16 years dedicated to the diagnostic imaging market with a focus on Magnetic Resonance.

contactSection.title: Shall we talk about your operation?
contactSection.subtitle: Fill out the form and receive a personalized evaluation from a Hexamedical specialist. No commitment.

bullets.experience: 16+ years of experience in medical equipment

ctaBanner.headline: Ready to optimize your diagnostic imaging operation?
ctaBanner.subtitle: Talk to a Hexamedical specialist and discover the ideal solution for your institution.

trust.title: Proven Trust
trust.subtitle: Numbers that reflect our dedication to the diagnostic imaging market.

mindray.title: Mindray Line: High Performance Digital Radiology
mindray.description: Authorized Mindray distributor in Brazil. Digital detectors, fixed and mobile systems with full technical support and national coverage.

footer.description: Specialists in diagnostic imaging solutions, technical services and high-performance support for healthcare institutions throughout Brazil.
footer.officeHours:
Monday to Thursday – 8am to 6pm
Friday – 8am to 5pm

form.name: Name
form.successDesc: Our team will contact you shortly.

servicesHub.heroHeadline: Technical services that ensure your operation
servicesHub.heroSubtitle: Preventive and corrective maintenance, flexible contracts, professional installation and specialized support with national coverage.
servicesHub.sectionSubtitle: Complete support solutions to keep your equipment at peak performance.

solucoesHub.heroSubtitle: Esaote MRI equipment with full technical support.

structure.heroSubtitle: We have a complete structure designed for delivering precise services to our clients. State-of-the-art infrastructure for maintenance, testing and repair of medical equipment.
structure.labDesc: Fully equipped for specialized repairs of medical equipment parts, with a rigorous process of analysis, recovery and testing.
structure.coverageSubtitle: Strategically located units for agile service throughout Brazil.
structure.ctaHeadline: Want to see our structure up close?
structure.ctaSubtitle: Schedule a visit and see our laboratories, testing rooms and showroom.

facilities.testRoomsDesc: For CT, X-ray and mammography equipment.
facilities.labDesc: Equipped for specialized repairs of modules, power supplies, coils and boards.
facilities.trainingDesc: For continuous education of internal staff and third-party training.

capabilities.qualityTests: Rigorous post-repair quality and reliability testing
capabilities.fullProcess: Complete analysis, recovery and validation process

contactPage.heroSubtitle: Get in touch to ask questions, request services or learn more about our medical equipment solutions.
